parsed.availability_comment: 2025 role was heavily reduced by injury; 2026 retention supports availability, but some durability risk remains.
parsed.availability_note: Shoulder injury disrupted IPL 2025; retained for IPL 2026, but no clear official confirmation found that the fitness concern is fully behind him.
parsed.followup_reason: Recent official evidence confirms retention, but not a clean 2026 fitness status; XI security still inferred after an injury-affected 2025.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Competes on role/fitness/form, not overseas quota.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Domestic player; no overseas-slot constraint. Selection battle is with other pace options.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained frontline Indian left-arm seamer; likely in DC's pace mix, but not fully lock-button after an injury-hit 2025 and competition from Starc/Mukesh/Chameera.
